phrases.cultural_note: Castel dell'Ovo, the Egg Castle, sits on the islet of Megaride and is Naples' oldest standing fortification.

responses.english: On the pier opposite, you can see it from here.
responses.phonetic: sool MOH-loh dee FRON-teh, see VEH-deh dah kwee.
responses.local: Sul molo di fronte, si vede da qui.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to watch the sunset over the Gulf
phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, qual è il posto migliore per il tramonto sul golfo?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, kwahl eh eel POS-toh meel-YOH-reh per eel trah-MON-toh sool GOL-foh?

responses.english: From Borgo Marinari, near Castel dell'Ovo.
responses.phonetic: dal BOR-goh mah-ree-NAH-ree, vee-CHEE-noh al KAS-tel del-LOH-voh.
responses.local: Dal Borgo Marinari, vicino al Castel dell'Ovo.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to hire a bike along the seafront
phrases.text_local: Scusi, dove si noleggiano le bici sul lungomare?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee, DOH-veh see noh-lej-JAH-noh leh BEE-chee sool loon-goh-MAH-reh?

responses.english: Near the Rotonda Diaz, there are hire stations.
responses.phonetic: vee-CHEE-noh AL-lah roh-TON-dah DYAHT-tsah, chee SOH-noh pos-tah-TSYOH-nee.
responses.local: Vicino alla Rotonda Diaz, ci sono postazioni.

phrases.intent_en: Ask which bus goes along the seafront
phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, quale autobus percorre il lungomare?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, KWAH-leh ow-toh-BOOS per-KOR-reh eel loon-goh-MAH-reh?

responses.english: Bus 140, along the whole of Via Caracciolo.
responses.phonetic: eel boos chen-toh-KWAR-AN-tah, LOON-goh TOOT-tah VEE-ah kah-RAT-choh-loh.
responses.local: Il bus 140, lungo tutta Via Caracciolo.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if there's a fish restaurant near the seafront
phrases.text_local: Scusi, c'è un ristorante di pesce fresco sul lungomare?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee, cheh oon rees-toh-RAN-teh dee PEH-sheh FRES-koh sool loon-goh-MAH-reh?

responses.english: Yes, at Borgo Marinari, excellent choice.
responses.phonetic: see, al BOR-goh mah-ree-NAH-ree, ot-TEE-mah SHEL-tah.
responses.local: Sì, al Borgo Marinari, ottima scelta.
